subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Praise be to God that, through divine favor and merciful grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی علیک بهائی و عنایتی لله الحمد بعنایت الهی و رحمت رحمانی در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @personal instructions
